title: The Journey Begins
highlight: Rahul: Aaj call pr Gate score check kr rhe the tabhi phone cut ho jata hai and Yadav suddenly gone like a ghost, mujhe kuch idea nahi tha kya chal raha hai. Yadav: Achanak plan bana France jaane ka aur packing me busy thi.
memory: The first day Yadav left for France. A mix of excitement and sadness because we couldn't meet at the airport.
quote: Distance is just a test of how far friendship can travel.

title: Full Day of Travel
highlight: Rahul: Subah uthte hi tera airport wala photo dekha. Thoda gussa bhi aaya kyunki mil nahi paya, but phir samjha ki sab kuch achanak hua hoga. Yadav: Kuwait wali flight me baithne ke baad bataya sab kuch aur France pahunch kar voice note bheja ki safely pahunch gayi.
memory: Yadav sent the first voice note from France. It felt like her dream was finally becoming real. Later we talked on a video call from the train and shared many stories.
quote: A new city, a new adventure, but the same bond.

title: First Morning in France
highlight: Yadav: Poora din documents aur university work me busy thi aur naye friends bhi mile. Rahul: Reply nahi aaya par pata tha wo safe hai.
memory: Yadav's first day at the university in France.
quote: Learning becomes more exciting when life itself is the classroom.

title: Morning View from Window
highlight: Rahul: Raat me call aaya aur tab pata chala France ka time India se 4:30 hours piche hai. Usne apna first day share kiya aur maine apne flatmates ke saath Holi ki baat batayi.
memory: From this day I decided to pray for her every morning until she comes back to India.
quote: True friendship means caring for someone even from miles away.

title: Feeling Low
highlight: Yadav: Aaj thoda down feel ho raha hai. Rahul: Fir kaafi der video call par baat ki aur sab share kiya.
memory: She felt a little homesick, but after a long conversation we ended up laughing for hours.
quote: Sometimes a long conversation is all it takes to make a day better.

title: Comeback Day of Yadav's Mood
highlight: Yadav: Aaj kaafi acha lag raha hai aur achha khana bhi khaya. Rahul: Main Holi ke liye ghar nikal raha hoon.
memory: A funny moment when my phone was left in the kitchen and bhabhi saw the call while we were talking.
quote: Happiness often comes from a simple conversation.

title: Ice Hockey Day
highlight: Yadav: Aaj ice hockey dekhne gayi aur bahut enjoy kiya. Rahul: Main ghar safely pahunch gaya.
memory: We talked only briefly today but even small conversations mattered.
quote: Distance makes you appreciate even the smallest moments.

title: First Sunday in March
highlight: Yadav: Ab thoda settle ho gayi hoon. Rahul: Main jagran me busy tha.
memory: Yadav visited an Indian restaurant and finally had a proper meal and good sleep.
quote: Even far from home, good food and rest can bring comfort.

title: Fresh Mood Begins
highlight: Rahul: Maine jiju ke saath Holi celebrate ki. Yadav: Busy in studies but enjoying the new environment.
memory: A busy day for both of us but still managed to chat a little.
quote: Festivals feel different when a friend celebrating with you is miles away.

title: First Test
highlight: Yadav: Aaj test hua. Rahul: Main bahar baith kar baat kar raha tha.
memory: Internet slow tha but we still managed to talk and share stories.
quote: Even slow internet cannot slow down real conversations.

title: Holi Missing
highlight: Yadav: Class me busy. Rahul: Apne gaon gaya tha.
memory: Different time zones made it difficult to talk, but it felt good seeing her settling well there.
quote: Different time zones, but the same friendship.

title: Festival Night
highlight: Rahul: Bazaar ghoom raha tha. Yadav: College festival night enjoy kar rahi thi.
memory: They cooked bread sandwiches together with friends.
quote: New places bring new stories and unforgettable memories.

title: Presentation Day
highlight: Yadav: Aaj IoT presentation thi. Rahul: Mujhe yaad nahi aaj kya baat hui thi.
memory: Her first presentation in France.
quote: The first step in a new place is always the bravest one.

title: Learning Something New
highlight: Yadav: Piano seekhne wali hoon. Rahul: College life me wapas aa gaya.
memory: She started learning piano and guitar while adjusting to life there.
quote: Every new skill is a step forward in a new life.

title: Early Morning Call
highlight: Rahul: Subah subah call kar diya jab wo so rahi thi.
memory: We talked about random things and wished her Happy Women's Day.
quote: Sometimes the best memories begin with an unexpected call.

title: Busy Day
highlight: Yadav: College me busy. Rahul: MSE exams start ho gaye.
memory: We couldn't talk much but small messages kept the connection alive.
quote: Busy days remind us how valuable even a small message can be.

title: Germany Tour
highlight: Yadav: Germany trip par gayi thi.
memory: It felt amazing seeing her explore another country and enjoy the journey.
quote: The world becomes smaller when your friends start exploring it.

title: Hackathon Day
highlight: Yadav: Hackathon me busy thi aur language samajh nahi aa rahi thi.
memory: Even without understanding everything she kept trying.
quote: Sometimes we don't understand everything, but we still keep going.

title: Hackathon Day 2
highlight: Yadav: Aaj thoda samajh aaya aur naye friends bhi bane.
memory: She made new international friends and started enjoying the experience.
quote: New friendships make a foreign place feel a little more like home.

title: Planning a Surprise
highlight: Rahul: Website bana raha hoon uske liye. Yadav: Hackathon me second place.
memory: Started building this digital diary to save every memory of the journey.
quote: Some stories are too special to stay only in memory.

title: Today's Update
highlight: Rahul: Website update kar raha tha aur usse kuch memories confirm kar raha tha.
memory: We talked for hours while she was working and I was building the website.
quote: Every day apart is another page added to our story.
